arts.ttl: What Leeds United boss Daniel Farke said on Coventry City victory and Ethan Ampadu's knee injury
arts.sum: Boss Daniel Farke hailed his Leeds United side following their "mature" performance at home to Coventry City. Farke, who confirmed captain Ethan Ampadu was forced off with a knee injury and will be assessed over the coming days, said: "(We) controlled everything off the ball, but decisions in passing were not that great.

arts.ttl: Coventry City player ratings as Sky Blues bystanders against slick-looking Leeds United - Andy Turner
arts.sum: That finally came early after the break when Ben Sheaf attempted a shot, albeit flying high and wide of the goal, but Daniel Farke’s men picked City off in the 49th minute when full-back Jaydon Bogle played a one-two down the right and fired in off the keeper, who got a touch but couldn’t stop it hitting the back of the net. Mark Robins threw on Haji Wright, Tatsuhiro Sakamoto and Brandon Thomas-Asante just after the hour but the Sky Blues were chasing the game and Leeds were content to sit back, soak up any pressure and hit City on the counter attack, knowing that the three points were in the bag.

arts.ttl: Leeds United player ratings with Gnonto and Ramazani superb in Coventry win
arts.sum: The second goal came early in the second half with Largie Ramazani feeding Jayden Bogle for his maiden Leeds strike. No goal or assist, but Aaronson had a really good all-round performance.

arts.ttl: Leeds brush past Coventry to maintain impressive early form
arts.sum: The away side are struggling so far this campaign.

arts.ttl: Leeds United suffer new injury scare during Championship clash with Coventry City
arts.sum: Leeds United starting XI: Illan Meslier; Jayden Bogle, Joe Rodon, Pascal Struijk, Junior Firpo; Ethan Ampadu, Ilia Gruev; Wilfried Gnonto, Brenden Aaronson, Largie Ramazani; Mateo Joseph. By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Former Leeds United star Georginio Rutter has already left Danny Murphy with egg on his face
arts.sum: Rutter said it was hard to say goodbye to United 18 months after arriving from Hoffenheim in a club-record deal. Georginio Rutter has today scored his first goal since swapping Leeds United for Brighton and Hove Albion.

arts.ttl: Seven changes as key man returns and keeper dropped - Coventry City team to face Leeds United - CoventryLive
arts.sum: City: Ben Wilson; Joel Latibeaudiere, Bobby Thomas, Liam Kitching, Jay Dasilva; Josh Eccles, Ben Sheaf; Milan van Ewijk, Jack Rudoni, Ephron Mason-Clark; Ellis Simms. The other big news is that Oliver Dovin has been dropped, replaced by Ben Wilson in goal, who plays behind a back four that sees the central defensive partnership of Bobby Thomas and Liam Kitching – in for Luis Binks – on a day when Joel Latibeaudiere comes back into the starting line-up at right-back and Jay Dasilva replaces Jake Bidwell at left-back.

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Coventry City as injury doubts cleared up by Farke selection
arts.sum: Pascal Struijk was the biggest question mark coming into today’s match, but he has been passed fit and continues in central defence alongside Joe Rodon. Leeds United: Illan Meslier; Jayden Bogle, Joe Rodon, Pascal Struijk, Junior Firpo; Ethan Ampadu, Ilia Gruev; Wilfried Gnonto, Brenden Aaronson, Largie Ramazani; Mateo Joseph.

arts.ttl: Leeds United v Coventry City live updates and team news from Elland Road
arts.sum: Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group. Unlike the Sky Blues, the Whites have got their 2024/25 campaign off to a decent start with 11 points from their opening six games to leave them sitting comfortably in sixth place.

arts.ttl: Leeds United chain reaction could hit best weapon vs Coventry as dry spell looms
arts.sum: Tanaka has been promising in his cameos from the bench, but Farke has singled Rothwell out more than once for praise this season. Unlike Struijk, Junior Firpo was in full training on Thursday and Farke was hopeful, if the Dominican’s body reacted positively, he would be ready for today.
